title: Arc
description: Arc: A plane curve. A circular Arc, a curve, with a constant distance from a point, its centre, defined it the local angular domain between start and end angle.

Radius.description: Distance from the CoordinateSystem.Origin to the any point on Arc. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

StartAngle.description: Angle in radians to the start point from the local x-axis, counter clockwise around the local z-axis. Property has a quantity of type Angle meassured in [rad].

EndAngle.description: Angle in radians to the end point from the local x-axis, counter clockwise around the local z-axis. Property has a quantity of type Angle meassured in [rad].

_t.description: Optional Type descriminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
